# Run 2026-06-29 run 2 (workflow run 28387060255)

Selected tasks: 4, 2, 5 + 11.

**Task 5 (Coding Improvements)** — Addressed auto-generated issue #148 (large-file-simplifier on `settings_screen.dart`). Branch `repo-assist/split-settings-screen-2026-06-29` (commit `564b854`):
- 14 previously-private helper widgets hoisted into 9 focused files under `lib/features/settings/presentation/widgets/`: `settings_tile.dart` (217 LOC), `settings_divider.dart` (53), `settings_section_header.dart` (78), `settings_value_pill.dart` (70), `settings_card.dart` (93), `account_hero_card.dart` (164), `sync_status_pill.dart` (46), `api_base_url_editor.dart` (167), `recording_mic_tile.dart` (133).
- Two near-identical API URL editors (`_ApiBaseUrlEditor` / `_AiApiBaseUrlEditor`, ~190 LOC of duplicated load/save/spinner lifecycle) replaced by a single parameterized `BaseUrlEditor` taking `loadUrl`, `saveUrl`, optional `clearOverride` callbacks, and localised `hintText` / `saveLabel` / `useDefaultLabel` / `clearedLabel` strings.
- `settings_screen.dart`: **1,605 → 716 LOC** (55% reduction). Every new file ≤ 217 LOC, well under the 300-LOC acceptance criterion.
- Naming deviation: the proposal said keep `_` prefix on moved widgets, but library privacy in Dart is per-library, so the moved widgets are now **public** (`SettingsTile`, `SettingsCard`, etc.), matching `about_section_card.dart` / `language_choice_sheet.dart` convention.

**Task 4** — No actionable change.

**Task 2** — All 5 pre-existing open issues auto-generated; commented on #148 (the issue the work addressed) with branch + naming rationale.

**Task 11** — Updated #147 with this run's history entry and "Review PR-equivalent for #148" line.

Verification: `dart format` clean, `flutter analyze` clean on settings, `flutter test` 576/577 (1 pre-existing ffmpeg-kit Linux plugin failure unrelated to this refactor).
